subcodes.first_line: O thou cherished remembrance of Abul-Fadl! Some months ago a detailed reply to thy previous letter was written and dispatched [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار ابوالفضائل چند ماه پیش جواب نامه مفصل قدیم مرقوم گردید و ارسال شد
subcodes.subjects: @criticism and its limits, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @rational arguments, @literal interpretation, @the mind's power of discovery, @newspapers and the media; publications
